title: alchemilla vulgaris var. flaccida
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. flaccida, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The medicinal properties of lady's mantle include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with lady's mantle include soothing menstrual cramps, reducing bleeding, and providing relief from gastrointestinal issues. Lady's mantle can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
